parts.name: Light Thruster
parts.description: Compact and efficient. Gets you where you need to go.

parts.name: Standard Drive
parts.description: Workhorse propulsion for mid-size vessels.

parts.name: Foundry Heavy Drive
parts.description: Massive thrust output from a rugged industrial powerplant.

parts.name: Racing Afterburner
parts.description: All exhaust, minimal housing. Burns hot and fast.

parts.name: Wide Thruster Array
parts.description: Broad bank of nozzles for maximum even thrust distribution.

parts.name: Twin Nacelle
parts.description: Dual-column engines with hull between. Balanced thrust profile.

parts.name: Split Engine
parts.description: Gap-center design for distinctive silhouette and heat dispersal.

parts.name: Tapered Nozzle
parts.description: Narrowing exhaust for focused thrust at the cost of spread.

parts.name: Micro Thruster
parts.description: Tiny maneuvering jet. Place several for coverage.

parts.name: Whisper Drive
parts.description: Low-signature propulsion that barely registers on sensors.

parts.name: Efficient Drive
parts.description: Precision-engineered for maximum fuel economy.

parts.name: Vectored Thrust
parts.description: Adjustable nozzle angles for superior maneuverability.

parts.name: Ion Array
parts.description: Electric-blue ion stream. Steady, efficient, unmistakable.

parts.name: Scrapyard Burner
parts.description: Runs on hope and recycled fuel. Somehow still works.

parts.name: Capital Powerplant
parts.description: Industrial-scale propulsion for the largest vessels.

parts.name: Basic Emitter
parts.description: Entry-level shield projection. Thin but better than bare hull.

parts.name: Standard Generator
parts.description: Solid shield coverage with decent regeneration.

parts.name: Sable Compact Node
parts.description: Small but effective. Place several for distributed coverage.

parts.name: Fortress Projector
parts.description: Massive shield generator for capital-class protection.

parts.name: Directional Barrier
parts.description: Flat emitter array projecting shields primarily in one direction.

parts.name: Shield Dome
parts.description: Rounded emitter geometry for even omnidirectional coverage.

parts.name: Phase Barrier
parts.description: Stealth-compatible shielding that barely registers on scanners.

parts.name: Heavy Projector
parts.description: Thick emitter bank for ships that plan to take hits.

parts.name: Ring Emitter
parts.description: Hollow-center design with omnidirectional projection.

parts.name: Layered Barrier
parts.description: Multiple emitter rows for redundant shield coverage.

parts.name: Patchwork Emitter
parts.description: Scavenged shield hardware. Flickers sometimes.

parts.name: Small Hold
parts.description: Compact cargo space for essential supplies.

parts.name: Standard Bay
parts.description: Decent cargo volume for the working trader.

parts.name: Wide Hold
parts.description: Broader bay for bulky cargo that does not stack well.

parts.name: Bulk Freighter Bay
parts.description: Industrial-scale cargo storage. The backbone of commerce.

parts.name: Tall Hold
parts.description: Vertical bay that fits narrow hull designs.

parts.name: Mega Container
parts.description: The largest cargo module money can buy. All commerce, no combat.

parts.name: Refrigerated Hold
parts.description: Temperature-controlled bay for perishable goods.

parts.name: Smuggling Compartment
parts.description: Hidden cargo space. Scan-resistant by design.

parts.name: Modular Rack
parts.description: External-mount cargo frame. Cheap storage at the cost of exposure.

parts.name: Standard Quarters
parts.description: Adequate living space with basic life support.

parts.name: Bunk Room
parts.description: Minimal crew space. Functional, not comfortable.

parts.name: Barracks
parts.description: High-density crew housing. Military efficiency, zero luxury.

parts.name: Officer Cabin
parts.description: Private quarters that boost crew morale.

parts.name: Luxury Suite
parts.description: Spacious living quarters with amenities. Attracts the best crew.

parts.name: Compact Quarters
parts.description: Space-efficient crew module for streamlined hulls.

parts.name: Extended Hab
parts.description: Long crew section for vessels with deep-space endurance.

parts.name: Hammock Bay
parts.description: Strung-up sleeping space. At least it has air.

parts.name: Compact Reactor
parts.description: Minimal power plant. Keeps the lights on.

parts.name: Standard Reactor
parts.description: Reliable power generation for most configurations.

parts.name: Heavy Reactor
parts.description: High-output industrial power core. Heavy but dependable.

parts.name: Overcharged Core
parts.description: Runs hot. More power per kilogram than anything else.

parts.name: Efficient Cell
parts.description: Compact, clean energy. Maximum output per unit weight.

parts.name: Capital Reactor
parts.description: Ship-core power generation for the largest vessels.

parts.name: Shielded Core
parts.description: Extra hull layering around the reactor. Heavier, safer.

parts.name: Micro Reactor
parts.description: Tiny supplemental power source for stealth builds.

parts.name: Sensor Array
parts.description: Detection suite for improved scanning and targeting.

parts.name: Small Fuel Tank
parts.description: Extra fuel reserves for longer voyages.

parts.name: Large Fuel Tank
parts.description: Substantial fuel reserves for extended expeditions.

parts.name: Extended Fuel Tank
parts.description: Long, narrow tank that fits along the spine.

parts.name: Medical Bay
parts.description: Treatment facility for crew injuries and recovery.

parts.name: Workshop
parts.description: On-board repair facility with basic fabrication tools.

parts.name: Refinery Pod
parts.description: Compact ore processing facility for in-flight refining.

parts.name: Brig
parts.description: Reinforced holding cells for prisoners and bounties.

parts.name: Science Lab
parts.description: Analysis equipment for anomalies and artifacts.

parts.name: Communications Array
parts.description: Long-range signal equipment for trading intel and distress calls.

parts.name: Drone Bay
parts.description: Launch and recovery platform for utility drones.

parts.name: Navigation Computer
parts.description: Advanced route optimization for fuel-efficient travel.

parts.name: EW Suite
parts.description: Electronic warfare systems for jamming and deception.

parts.name: Tractor Beam
parts.description: Gravitational projector for salvage hauling.

parts.name: Life Support
parts.description: Extended atmospheric processing for long voyages.

parts.name: Escape Pod
parts.description: Emergency crew evacuation system. Mandatory on some routes.

parts.name: Crew Lounge
parts.description: Recreation space that keeps crew sharp on long hauls.

parts.name: Nexus Trade Terminal
parts.description: Guild-certified market terminal. Real-time commodity feeds from the Central Exchange.

parts.name: Guild Customs Seal
parts.description: Pre-cleared cargo documentation module. Expedites inspections at Guild-aligned stations.

parts.name: Hydroponic Bay
parts.description: Living cargo hold lined with growth substrate. Perishable goods last longer in transit.

parts.name: Verdant Life Module
parts.description: Crew quarters with integrated greenery. Fresh air and growing things keep spirits high.

parts.name: Forge Repair Rig
parts.description: On-board welding and patching station. The Union way: fix it yourself, fix it right.

parts.name: Prospector's Scanner
parts.description: Tuned for mineral signatures in dense asteroid fields. A Breakstone miner's best friend.

parts.name: Axiom Analysis Core
parts.description: Peer-reviewed sensor algorithms running on dedicated hardware. Sees what others theorize about.

parts.name: Experimental Lattice
parts.description: High-regen, low-capacity shield prototype. Recovers fast but shatters under sustained fire.

parts.name: Garden Quarters
parts.description: Crew space woven with climbing vines and filtered sunlight. Rest here actually restores you.

parts.name: Mediator Array
parts.description: Long-range diplomatic communications suite. Broadcasts good faith on all frequencies.

parts.name: Wrecker's Haul Bay
parts.description: Reinforced cargo hold with magnetic clamps for salvaged wreckage. Smells like old battles.

parts.name: Grand Bazaar Hold
parts.description: Climate-controlled luxury cargo bay with anti-vibration mounting. For goods that deserve better.

parts.name: Stellaris VIP Suite
parts.description: First-class crew accommodations with private viewports and climate zones. Attracts top talent.

parts.name: Nova Prototype Drive
parts.description: Experimental high-efficiency engine running classified fuel mixtures. Quiet, fast, questionably legal.

parts.name: Classified Sensor Suite
parts.description: Sensor array running algorithms that do not officially exist. What it finds, it keeps quiet about.

parts.name: Void Maw Reactor
parts.description: The Void Leviathan's heart. It pulses with absorbed starlight and the death-screams of a dozen ships. Converts incoming damage into stored void charge that can be unleashed as a devastating pulse. The reactor hums at a frequency that makes your teeth ache.

parts.name: Forgeborn Bulwark
parts.description: The Iron Maw's shield array, ripped from its carcass while the metal was still glowing. Crystalline lattices that harden under sustained bombardment. Every hit makes it tougher. Every volley makes it angrier. The foundry workers who helped you extract it crossed themselves and refused to touch it.

parts.name: The Collection Engine
parts.description: The Collector's central processing hub. A masterwork of parallel systems engineering that cycles weapons and shields faster than any human crew could manage. Reduces all equipment cooldowns and grants a single moment of impossible speed: two actions in one turn, once per battle. The Collector used it to acquire everything. Now you use it to keep what matters.

parts.name: Salvaged Pulse Emitter
parts.description: A jury-rigged energy weapon pulled from scrap. Weak but functional.

combat_move.name: Pulse Shot
combat_move.description: A flickering energy pulse. Low damage, but it gets the job done.

parts.name: Mining Laser Retrofit
parts.description: A repurposed mining laser that deals moderate damage. Cheap and reliable.

combat_move.name: Mining Laser
combat_move.description: A repurposed mining laser. Decent accuracy, moderate damage.

parts.name: Laser Cannon
parts.description: Standard combat laser with good accuracy and consistent damage output.

combat_move.name: Laser Cannon
combat_move.description: A focused laser beam. Accurate and reliable.

parts.name: Dual Laser Array
parts.description: Twin-mounted laser system with synchronized fire control for increased damage.

combat_move.name: Dual Laser Burst
combat_move.description: Fires both lasers in a focused burst.

parts.name: Missile Launcher
parts.description: High-damage explosive missiles with a cooldown between salvos.

combat_move.name: Missile Salvo
combat_move.description: Launches an explosive missile. High damage, low accuracy.

parts.name: Ion Disruptor
parts.description: Drains enemy shields while dealing light damage. Effective against shielded targets.

combat_move.name: Ion Blast
combat_move.description: Disrupts shields and deals light damage.

parts.name: Plasma Torpedo
parts.description: Devastating plasma charge. Extremely powerful but energy-hungry with a long cooldown.

combat_move.name: Plasma Torpedo
combat_move.description: A devastating plasma charge.

parts.name: Basic Shield Generator
parts.description: Restores 20 shield points when activated.

combat_move.name: Shield Restore
combat_move.description: Restores 20 shield points.

parts.name: Armor Plating
parts.description: Activates reinforced armor, reducing incoming damage by 15% for 2 turns.

combat_move.name: Reinforce Armor
combat_move.description: +15% damage reduction for 2 turns.

parts.name: Point Defense System
parts.description: Activates point defense, granting +25 evasion for 1 turn.

combat_move.name: Point Defense
combat_move.description: +25 evasion for 1 turn.

parts.name: Emergency Repair Kit
parts.description: Restores 25 hull points. Has a 3-turn cooldown.

combat_move.name: Emergency Repair
combat_move.description: Restores 25 hull points.

parts.name: Advanced Shield Array
parts.description: Restores 40 shields and grants 10% damage reduction for 2 turns.

combat_move.name: Advanced Shields
combat_move.description: Restores 40 shields + 10% damage reduction for 2 turns.

parts.name: Autocannon
parts.description: Rapid-fire ballistic weapon. Low damage per shot but high accuracy and no cooldown.

combat_move.name: Autocannon Burst
combat_move.description: A rapid burst of ballistic rounds.

parts.name: Rail Gun
parts.description: Electromagnetic accelerator fires a devastating slug. High damage and accuracy but energy-hungry with a cooldown.

combat_move.name: Rail Shot
combat_move.description: A hypervelocity slug that punches through armor.

parts.name: Flak Battery
parts.description: Area-effect weapon that fills space with shrapnel. Wide spread, no cooldown.

combat_move.name: Flak Barrage
combat_move.description: A wide spread of shrapnel. Hard to dodge, moderate damage.

parts.name: Reactive Armor
parts.description: Passive +20 hull. Active ability: 20% damage reduction for 2 turns.

combat_move.name: Reactive Armor
combat_move.description: Activates reactive plating. 20% damage reduction for 2 turns.

parts.name: ECM Suite
parts.description: Electronic countermeasures grant +30 evasion for 2 turns.

combat_move.name: ECM Burst
combat_move.description: Electronic countermeasures. +30 evasion for 2 turns.

parts.name: Prototype Shield Matrix
parts.description: Experimental Axiom shield technology. Restores 50 shields and grants 15% damage reduction for 3 turns.

combat_move.name: Prototype Shield Matrix
combat_move.description: Experimental shields. 50 restore + 15% reduction for 3 turns.

parts.name: Reinforced Plating
parts.description: Military-grade hull reinforcement. Dramatically increases structural integrity.

combat_move.name: Brace Plating
combat_move.description: Activates forge-bonded plating. Absorbs the next hit completely.

parts.name: Plasma Conduit
parts.description: Superheated plasma channeled through magnetic conduits. Devastating at close range.

combat_move.name: Plasma Torrent
combat_move.description: A sustained plasma beam that burns through shields and hull alike.

parts.name: Titan Plating
parts.description: The heaviest armor available outside of military contracts. Nearly impervious to kinetic weapons.

combat_move.name: Titan Brace
combat_move.description: Engage stellarium lattice to absorb incoming fire. Reduces damage taken this turn by 75%.

parts.name: Nova Core
parts.description: Experimental weapon that channels stellar energy into a focused beam. The pinnacle of energy weapon technology.

combat_move.name: Nova Blast
combat_move.description: Release a concentrated resonance burst. Devastating damage that bypasses shields.

parts.name: Phantom Module
parts.description: Experimental sensor-dampening technology. Reduces the ship's sensor profile significantly.

combat_move.name: Phantom Cloak
combat_move.description: Activate sensor spoofing to become nearly untargetable for one turn.

parts.name: Shield Capacitor Bank
parts.description: Banks of energy capacitors that boost shield regeneration rate under fire.

combat_move.name: Shield Surge
combat_move.description: Dump stored capacitor energy into shields for an immediate burst of regeneration.

parts.name: Arc Emitter
parts.description: Phase lattice weapon that fires a directed energy arc. Bypasses a portion of enemy shields.

combat_move.name: Arc Discharge
combat_move.description: Fire a phase-aligned energy arc that partially bypasses shields.

parts.name: Power Shunt Module
parts.description: Diverts all weapon power to the capacitor banks. Sacrifices your attack this turn to restore 4 energy for a big play next round.

combat_move.name: Power Shunt
combat_move.description: Skip your attack to restore 4 energy.

parts.name: Capacitor Dump Array
parts.description: An experimental weapon that recycles impact energy. Deals moderate damage and recovers 2 energy on a successful hit.

combat_move.name: Capacitor Dump
combat_move.description: Deal 14 damage. On hit, restore 2 energy.

parts.name: Overcharge Coil
parts.description: Supercharges your weapon systems. Your next attack deals 50% more damage, but the overcharge process is expensive.

combat_move.name: Overcharge
combat_move.description: Next attack deals +50% damage.

parts.name: Slug Thrower
parts.description: Reliable kinetic rounds that punch through armor plating.

combat_move.name: Slug Thrower
combat_move.description: Reliable kinetic rounds.

parts.name: Railgun Accelerator

combat_move.name: Railgun Accelerator
combat_move.description: Magnetically accelerated kinetic slugs.

combat_move.description: Devastating kinetic payload.

combat_move.description: Superheated plasma that burns on contact.

combat_move.description: Concentrated plasma stream with intense burn.

parts.name: Solar Flare Cannon
parts.description: Plasma weapon that burns through shields with solar-intensity heat.

combat_move.name: Solar Flare Cannon
combat_move.description: Plasma that burns through shields.

parts.name: Ion Disruptor
parts.description: Electrical discharge that overloads enemy shield generators.

combat_move.name: Ion Disruptor
combat_move.description: Electrical discharge that overloads shields.

parts.name: Arc Emitter
parts.description: Sustained ion arc that strips enemy shields with relentless efficiency.

combat_move.name: Arc Emitter
combat_move.description: Sustained ion arc that strips shields.

parts.name: Cascade Ionizer
parts.description: Cascading ion pulse where overkill on shields carries through to hull.

combat_move.name: Cascade Ionizer
combat_move.description: Cascading ion pulse. Overkill on shields carries to hull.

parts.name: Frost Projector
parts.description: Cryogenic spray that chills and slows enemy systems.

combat_move.name: Frost Projector
combat_move.description: Cryogenic spray that chills enemy systems.

parts.name: Glacial Beam
parts.description: Sustained cold beam that progressively slows enemy systems.

combat_move.name: Glacial Beam
combat_move.description: Sustained cold beam that slows enemy systems.

parts.name: Absolute Zero Array
parts.description: Flash-freezes enemy at the molecular level. Freezes target at 2 stacks.

combat_move.name: Absolute Zero Array
combat_move.description: Flash-freezes enemy at molecular level. Freezes at 2 stacks.

parts.name: Voltaic Pulse
parts.description: Disrupting energy pulse that weakens enemy firepower.

combat_move.name: Voltaic Pulse
combat_move.description: Disrupting energy pulse that weakens enemy firepower.

parts.name: Storm Emitter
parts.description: Sustained electrical storm that suppresses enemy weapons.

combat_move.name: Storm Emitter
combat_move.description: Sustained electrical storm that suppresses weapons.

parts.name: Tempest Cannon
parts.description: Devastating voltaic discharge that suppresses weapons. 15% suppression per stack.

combat_move.name: Tempest Cannon
combat_move.description: Devastating voltaic discharge. 15% suppression per stack.

parts.name: Point Defense System
parts.description: Automated turret network that intercepts incoming projectiles.

combat_move.name: Point Defense
combat_move.description: Activates defensive countermeasures. Next incoming attack deals 50% less damage.

parts.name: EMP Pulse Emitter
parts.description: Short-range electromagnetic burst that scrambles enemy power systems.

combat_move.name: EMP Pulse
combat_move.description: Electromagnetic pulse that damages and drains enemy energy.

parts.name: Targeting Lock Computer
parts.description: Advanced fire-control system that calculates precise firing solutions.

combat_move.name: Targeting Lock
combat_move.description: Locks firing solutions onto the target. +25 accuracy for 3 turns.

parts.name: Emergency Vent System
parts.description: Controlled shield discharge that converts barrier energy into ship power.

combat_move.name: Emergency Vent
combat_move.description: Sacrifice 15 shields to restore 5 energy. Desperate but effective.

parts.name: System Reboot Module
parts.description: Hard-reset protocol that purges corrupted data from all ship subsystems.

combat_move.name: System Reboot
combat_move.description: Purges all negative status effects from ship systems.

parts.name: Broadside Battery
parts.description: Multi-barrel kinetic array that fires in a wide spread pattern.

combat_move.name: Broadside
combat_move.description: Unleashes a devastating barrage hitting ALL enemies.

parts.name: Nova Burst Cannon
parts.description: Overcharged particle accelerator that channels all weapon power into one shot.

combat_move.name: Nova Burst
combat_move.description: Channels all weapon power into a single devastating shot.

parts.name: Countermeasure Pod
parts.description: Deployable decoy system that absorbs incoming fire.

combat_move.name: Countermeasures
combat_move.description: Deploys decoys that completely absorb the next incoming hit.

parts.name: Salvage Drone Bay
parts.description: Automated drone launcher that recovers usable energy from battlefield debris.

combat_move.name: Salvage Drone
combat_move.description: Deploys a drone that scavenges the battlefield. Restores 4 energy.

parts.name: Reinforced Hull Plating
parts.description: Layered composite plating that absorbs kinetic impacts. +1 armor.

combat_move.name: Brace
combat_move.description: Braces hull plating against incoming fire. Reduces damage for 2 turns.

parts.name: Reactive Armor System
parts.description: Smart armor that detonates outward on impact, neutralizing projectiles. +2 armor.

combat_move.name: Ablative Shield
combat_move.description: Sacrifices outer armor layers to absorb a devastating hit.

parts.name: Nano-Repair Suite
parts.description: Swarms of nanobots continuously seal hull breaches. +1 armor.

combat_move.name: Rapid Mend
combat_move.description: Deploys emergency nanobot swarm to restore 35 hull integrity.

parts.name: Structural Integrity Matrix
parts.description: An interlocking lattice of reinforced struts that distributes impact force across the hull. +3 armor.

combat_move.name: Fortify
combat_move.description: Locks structural matrix into maximum rigidity. Reduces damage for 3 turns.

parts.name: Titan-Class Bulkhead
parts.description: Military-grade bulkhead forged from compressed neutronium alloy. +4 armor.

combat_move.name: Unbreakable
combat_move.description: Channels all power to structural integrity. Nearly impervious for 2 turns.

parts.name: Field Repair Rig
parts.description: Portable welding and patching equipment that reduces station repair costs by 25%.

combat_move.name: Patch Up
combat_move.description: Performs emergency hull repairs mid-combat. Restores 20 hull.

parts.name: Shield Power Conduit
parts.description: Dedicated power conduit that feeds the shield generator. +2 shield regen.

combat_move.name: Pulse Shield
combat_move.description: Surges power through the shield conduit. Restores 20 shield points.

parts.name: Adaptive Barrier Array
parts.description: Shield array that recalibrates its frequency to match incoming fire. +3 shield regen.

combat_move.name: Adaptive Ward
combat_move.description: Recalibrates shields and braces for impact. Restores 30 shields and reduces damage for 1 turn.

parts.name: Shield Harmonics Generator
parts.description: Generates resonance patterns that amplify shield regeneration cycles. +4 shield regen.

combat_move.name: Resonance Pulse
combat_move.description: Releases a harmonic pulse that restores 40 shield points.

parts.name: Quantum Shield Matrix
parts.description: Experimental shield that exists in a superposition state, partially phasing out of reality. +5 shield regen.

combat_move.name: Phase Shields
combat_move.description: Shifts shields into quantum superposition. Massive damage reduction for 2 turns.

parts.name: Aegis Shield Projector
parts.description: Top-of-the-line shield projector used by capital ships. +6 shield regen.

combat_move.name: Aegis Protocol
combat_move.description: Activates full defensive protocol. Restores 50 shields and reduces damage for 3 turns.

parts.name: Ion-Hardened Shield Coils
parts.description: Specialized coils that resist ion weapon interference. +30% ion resistance.

combat_move.name: Discharge
combat_move.description: Discharges built-up ion energy, restoring 15 shield points.

parts.name: Maneuvering Thruster Array
parts.description: Multi-directional thrusters that improve combat maneuverability. +5 evasion.

combat_move.name: Jink
combat_move.description: Executes a rapid lateral thrust. +15 evasion for 1 turn.

parts.name: ECM Countermeasure Suite
parts.description: Electronic warfare system that scrambles enemy targeting solutions. +8 evasion.

combat_move.name: Chaff Cloud
combat_move.description: Deploys a cloud of sensor-scattering chaff. +20 evasion for 2 turns.

parts.name: Phase Shift Drive
parts.description: Momentarily shifts the ship out of phase with normal space. +10 evasion.

combat_move.name: Phase Shift
combat_move.description: Phases out of reality. Untouchable for 1 turn.

parts.name: Ghost Plating
parts.description: Stealth-composite hull that bends sensor returns. +12 evasion.

combat_move.name: Vanish
combat_move.description: Disappears from all sensor grids. +200 evasion for 2 turns.

parts.name: Quantum Blink Engine
parts.description: Micro-jump drive that teleports the ship short distances. +15 evasion.

combat_move.name: Blink
combat_move.description: Teleports to an advantageous position. +200 evasion and +30 accuracy for 1 turn.

parts.name: Lightweight Frame
parts.description: Stripped-down frame that trades hull integrity for agility. +5 evasion, -15 hull.

combat_move.name: Nimble Dodge
combat_move.description: Uses the ship's light frame to slip past incoming fire. +10 evasion for 1 turn.

parts.name: The King's Repeater
parts.description: A legendary rapid-fire weapon system recovered from a superboss encounter. Chance to trigger chain fire on each hit.
